heading: Reimbursement for assistance provided to nongovernmental entertainment-oriented media producers
label: 2264 Reimbursement for assistance provided to nongovernmental entertainment-oriented media producers
notes: Amendments2017—Subsec. (b)(3). substituted “” for “the date of the enactment of the Carl Levin and Howard P. ‘Buck’ McKeon National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2015”.Pub. L. 115–91December 19, 2014

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: There shall be credited to the applicable appropriations account or fund from which the expenses described in subsection (b) were charged any amounts received by the Department of Defense as reimbursement for such expenses.
incurred by the Department of Defense as a result of providing assistance to a nongovernmental entertainment-oriented media producer;
for which the Department of Defense requires reimbursement under or any other provision of law; andsection 9701 of title 31
for which the Department of Defense received reimbursement after .December 19, 2014
